💬 Contact Us
🛡️ SECURITY AUDIT

Security Audit Before Hackers Find It

Has your website or API been security-tested? 60% of startups do not know they have critical vulnerabilities until a breach occurs. We audit and report before that happens.

Order Audit →View Scope
✓Setup <5 menit
✓Garansi 7 hari
✓Support via Telegram

If your online business has never been audited, you do not know what you do not know.

🔓

SQL injection, XSS, CSRF — classic vulnerabilities still present in 70% of web applications.

💸

The average data breach costs $4.45M (IBM 2023). One exploit can bankrupt a startup.

😱

API keys, credentials, and secrets leaked in public repos — has someone already accessed them?

⚖️

Data regulations (PDPA Indonesia, GDPR) mandate specific security standards.

Auditing now is cheaper than a breach later. Much cheaper.

🌐

Web Application Testing

OWASP Top 10: SQL injection, XSS, CSRF, broken auth, insecure deserialization, and more.

🔌

API Security Review

REST/GraphQL endpoint testing: authentication, authorization, rate limiting, data exposure.

🏗️

Infrastructure Scan

Port scanning, service fingerprinting, misconfiguration detection on servers and cloud.

🔑

Secrets Detection

Scan Git history, codebase, and config files for leaked API keys, passwords, and credentials.

📋

Vulnerability Report

Detailed report: severity level, CVSS score, proof of exploit, and remediation steps.

✅

Retest Included

After fixes, we retest found vulnerabilities. Free within 30 days.

⚡ Cara Kerja

From Scope to Report in 3 Phases

1

Scoping & Agreement

Define target (URL, IP range, API), testing scope, and sign rules of engagement. NDA included.

2

Testing & Analysis

Automated scanning + manual testing by security researcher. Every finding validated for zero false positives.

3

Report & Remediation

Complete report with severity, proof, and fix recommendations. Includes 1-hour consultation call.

💎 Pilih Paket

Investasi yang Langsung Balik Modal

Mulai kapan saja. Cancel kapan saja. Garansi 7 hari uang kembali.

Web Basic
$66/audit
  • 1 web app or API
  • OWASP Top 10 check
  • Automated + manual scan
  • PDF report
  • Critical & High severity
  • Delivery 3-5 days
  • 1x free retest
Order Web Basic
⭐ Paling PopulerComprehensive
$200/audit
  • Web app + API + infrastructure
  • Full OWASP + custom tests
  • Secrets detection scan
  • Detailed report + CVSS score
  • All severity levels
  • Delivery 7-10 days
  • Unlimited retest 30 days
  • 1-hour consultation call
Order Comprehensive
Enterprise
$465+/audit
  • Full scope (web + API + infra + mobile)
  • Red team simulation
  • Social engineering test
  • Executive + technical report
  • Compliance mapping (PDPA/ISO 27001)
  • Delivery 2-4 weeks
  • Quarterly retest included
  • Dedicated security engineer
